packageRules.description: Pin every GitHub Action by SHA (SECURITY-TODO #10).
Pin every container base image by digest (SECURITY-TODO #1).

Auto-merge container base-image *digest* refreshes once CI is green (SECURITY-TODO #31). The kernel<->akmods coupling check in build.yml is the safety interlock: a kinoite-main bump that moves the kernel fails that check, so Renovate cannot auto-merge it until the akmods tag is bumped by hand. Tag/version changes are not 'digest' updates and are never auto-merged. Customer machines fetch+stage only and never auto-reboot, so the human control gate is the reboot, not the merge.

Track SYFT_VERSION env var against anchore/syft GitHub releases (SECURITY-TODO #8).
